description.en: Complete AI overhaul: Changes the behavior of Diggles at work and during leisure. Highly configurable.
description.de: Komplette KI-Überarbeitung: Ändert das Verhalten der Wiggles bei der Arbeit und in der Freizeit. Hochgradig konfigurierbar.

content.en: This mod depends on bugfixes of the BugFix mod. If this mod is used, it is strongly recommended to install the BugFix mod as well.

settings.name: Max Search Multiplier
settings.description: Max search range multiplier for hungry gnomes (leisure tasks).

settings.name: Hunger Threshold
settings.description: Nutrition level (0.0-1.0) above which eating is deprioritized.

settings.name: Variety Age Threshold
settings.description: Age in days before gnomes start judging service variety and quality.

settings.name: Max Fun Needs
settings.description: Maximum number of distinct fun activities a gnome 'needs' before getting unhappy.

settings.name: Mood Sensitivity
settings.description: Multiplier for mood loss when leisure needs are unmet.

settings.name: Hospital Search Range
settings.description: Distance gnomes will search for an available hospital when injured.

settings.name: Kitchen Ingredient Range
settings.description: Range (in meters) at which kitchens look for loose ingredients on the ground.

settings.name: Workplace Preference Penalty
settings.description: Score penalty for assigning a gnome to a non-preferred workplace.

settings.name: Inventory Overload Penalty
settings.description: Score penalty per extra trip required if inventory is too small for a transport task.

settings.name: Digging Blacklist Duration
settings.description: Seconds to ignore a digging site that was found to be unreachable.

settings.name: Item Blacklist Duration
settings.description: Seconds to ignore a resource on the ground that was found to be unreachable.
